overview: PropTrader is a decentralized prop trading platform on the Internet Computer. Traders take a two-phase challenge to prove consistency and profitability, then receive funded accounts backed by pooled investor capital. The platform enforces strict on-chain risk controls, calculates consistency scores, and distributes profits transparently between traders, investors, and the platform. Integrated with ICPSwap and Sonic DEXs for live pricing and real swap execution.
features: Two-phase dynamic challenge system with on-chain pass/fail enforcement
Consistency scoring engine (profit distribution, win rate, drawdown control, trading activity)
ICPSwap and Sonic DEX integration with live price feeds and order execution
Simulated fills for challenge traders, real swaps for funded traders
On-chain risk engine: per-trade, daily drawdown, total drawdown, position size limits
Stop-loss and take-profit auto-execution via backend timer
Funded account allocation with performance multiplier scaling
Profit distribution: trader 70-80%, investor pool 15-25%, platform 5%
Dynamic admin parameter engine with cohort management and target outcome tracking
Trader dashboard with consistency score, payout history, funded balance
Investor dashboard with pool balance, trader allocation breakdown, period P&L
Public leaderboard ranked by profit %, risk score, consistency score
